sources.title: Scars of Dracula
sources.description: At Castle Dracula, a vampire bat flies in to an altar containing the  powdered remains of Count Dracula. The bat spits blood onto the vampire's remains and Dracula is resurrected.

sources.title: Scars Of Dracula 1970
sources.description: After a young man goes missing while spending the night at Castle Dracula, prompting his brother to visit the nearby town in search for him where all traces mysteriously vanish.

metadata.Plot: A young man, Paul Carlson, is on a trip and spends the night at Count Dracula's castle. He is murdered. After some time has passed, the young man's brother Simon comes to the small town where all the traces end to look for him.
metadata.Actors: Christopher Lee, Dennis Waterman, Jenny Hanley
